notes: Game works with Valve experimental Mesa ACO driver 19.1.0+aco+git1566466462-fc0fdb637b4-1bionic1. A couple of minor issues remain, if selecting adaptive vsync in the games options the fps tanks to single digits. Switching between desktop/fullscreen is not seamless, the cinnamon taskbar remains visible. See issue #1183 on Github
title: WRC 7 FIA World Rally Championship

notes: When played normally the game works almost fine (game modes, online, controllers). Areas of caution 1) Do not use 'Adaptive VSync' as it borks the game. To fix, edit UserSettings.cfg deep in /compatdata/621830/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/WRC7/. Change line 4 to "Engine.Device.PC.SmartVSync = false;". 2) Do not change graphics resolution during middle of a race. It completely freezes system and requires long-hold power button.
title: WRC 7 FIA World Rally Championship
